creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
On Tue, 17 Jul 2001, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
 # On Tue, 17 Jul 2001 08:05:41 MST, Joseph Scott wrote:
 # 
 # > 	How do you usually sort this out (the plist stuff) with this
 # > particular port (or ones like it that depend on items in LOCALBASE, when
 # > you want to install it to PREFIX)?
 # 
 # This is a bitch. :-)
 # 
 # Generally, I grab a typescript of the installation and massage the
 # install log until I can diff it against the pkg-plist.
 
 	Ok, well, at least I wasn't missing something simple then.  If you
 can write out an outline of the steps it takes to make this happen it
 would help me to generate more complete PRs in the future.  It might also
 make a nice addition to the porters handbook.
 
 Thanks.
 
 -Joseph
